title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
